beer.beer_description:
A HUGE collab with our pals across the ditch at Behemoth Brewing This IIIIIPA is officially the biggest beer we’ve ever brewed:
800kg of pilsner malt, ridiculous amounts of Nelson Sauvin (Amplifire + T90), and IBU throught the roof.

items.badge_description: What happens when you take two or more amazing breweries, throw them into the tank and let them ferment together? An amazing collaboration beer, that’s what! Cheers to working together to create the perfect flavor. That's 75 different beers that have been brewed as a collaboration. Try 5 more for Level 16!

items.badge_description: Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 20 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 5! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 45 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 10!

items.badge_description: You don't always intend to go for beers with a double digit ABV, but when you do, you make it count! Cheers to you, but be careful, 10% and up can really pack a punch. That's 125 different beers with an ABV of 10% and up. Try 5 more for Level 26!

user.location: I come from a land downunder
user.bio: Home is where the beer is.

user.bio: You can wake me up for avantgarde beers always! Whether barrel aged stouts, superfresh sours or hoploaded nedipas, love
Here’s to alcohol: the cause of, and solution to, all of life’s problems.
Beer, street art and travel. All the good things.

items.badge_description: Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

items.badge_description: We’re excited to unveil our annual badge in honor of International Women’s Day, shining a light on the amazing contributions of women and non-binary individuals within the craft beer scene and celebrating their creativity, passion, and dedication. Let’s raise our glasses to the pioneers who have forged a path for the next wave of female, femme-identifying, and non-binary brewers. Join the conversation on Instagram!
